subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-08-16
subcodes.first_line: Faith is the centre of human virtues. Through the light of faith justice is established.
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
